overall.description: A first-person perspective video game sequence depicting a player exploring a foggy, nighttime swamp settlement with wooden stilt houses. The player uses a flashlight to navigate the eerie environment, moving between structures and eventually entering a building where a silhouetted figure is encountered.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy swamp settlement with wooden stilt houses

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the foggy settlement, illuminating the path ahead with a flashlight while approaching a lit wooden stilt house

entered.detail: two-story wooden house on stilts with illuminated windows and exterior lighting
bright white light fixture mounted on the front porch of the main house
rusted metal roofing on the wooden structure reflecting the flashlight beam
weathered wooden railing along the elevated porch of the stilt house
tall trees silhouetted against the foggy night sky in the background

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a foggy swamp settlement at night, approaching a wooden stilt house with warm exterior lighting. The flashlight illuminates the dirt path and the weathered wooden structures while mist drifts between the buildings.

events.description: turns right to navigate around the main stilt house, revealing additional structures

agents.ego_description: navigating around the wooden structures, turning to explore the perimeter of the settlement while sweeping the flashlight across the environment

entered.detail: smaller wooden structure with illuminated windows on the right side of the path
elevated wooden decking connecting the stilt houses over the swampy ground
dark cylindrical container positioned beside the wooden walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving past the main house, the player turns right to explore deeper into the settlement, walking along wooden walkways that connect the stilt houses. The flashlight reveals a secondary shack and various wooden structures while the fog thickens in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of wooden shack with warm lighting

events.description: enters the wooden building through an open doorway, transitioning from exterior fog to interior space
encounters a silhouetted figure standing motionless in the interior doorway ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the lit wooden structure, discovering a motionless figure blocking the interior doorway

notable_agents.action: standing motionless in the interior doorway facing the player, backlit by warm interior light

entered.detail: open doorway emitting warm yellow light from inside the wooden structure
shelves mounted on the interior wall visible upon entering the room
dimly lit room beyond the doorway with wooden walls and ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a warmly lit doorway and enters the wooden building, leaving the foggy exterior behind. Inside, the flashlight reveals wooden shelves and walls, while a silhouetted figure stands motionless in a doorway ahead, creating a tense encounter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy nighttime swamp settlement that culminates in a tense interior encounter. It begins by navigating a dirt path toward a wooden stilt house, where a flashlight cuts through drifting mist and illuminates weathered structures bathed in warm exterior light. As the camera moves past the main house, it turns right to follow wooden walkways deeper into the settlement, passing a secondary shack while the surrounding fog thickens. The scene then shifts from the damp exterior to a confined indoor space as the camera crosses a warmly lit threshold into a wooden building. Finally, the flashlight reveals interior shelves and walls before settling on a motionless silhouetted figure standing in a doorway ahead.
